channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Carrefour apuesta por la IA centrada en el usuario final: así es el piloto desplegado en España
item.description: Carrefour apuesta en firme por la inteligencia artificial (IA) con el propósito de capitanear la transformación digital del sector del retail. La multinacional francesa ha elegido España como sede del proyecto piloto de IA que aspira a desplegar a lo largo y ancho de la geografía.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Hostinger has just added a super useful free feature for SMBs looking to get visitors and customers to their websites
item.description: Hostinger has announced a partnership with Google Ads to bake Performance Max campaigns directly into its Website Builder app.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: SpaceX flight launches 4 space tourists into first-ever polar orbit
item.description: A bitcoin investor who bought a SpaceX flight for himself and three polar explorers blasted off Monday night on the first rocket ride to carry people over the North and South poles. Chun Wang, a Chinese-born entrepreneur, hurtled into orbit from NASA’s Kennedy Space Center.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: The Nintendo Switch 2 dev kits reportedly don't feature 4K output
item.description: A new Nintendo Switch 2 rumor suggests that the console won't feature 4K output at launch - if the reported dev kits are anything to go by.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Cisco takes inspiration from Iron Man for its AI-driven platform engineer
item.description: When it comes to developing highly intelligent AI agents, one might not think of combining open systems technology and the theoretical super-logic behind a movie character, but Cisco’s Outshift development team is doing just that.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft has its AI-powered Security Copilot discover a whole host of previously unknown vulnerabilities
item.description: Almost two dozen new vulnerabilities were found by Security Copilot across different open source bootloaders.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Kendrick Lamar, Gracie Abrams and Zoe Saldaña earn Webby Award nominations, along with Nutter Butter
item.description: Kendrick Lamar, Gracie Abrams, Zoe Saldaña and Nutter Butter are among the nominees for this year’s Webby Awards, recognizing the best internet content and creators.
item.dc:creator: Mark Kennedy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lightmatter launches photonic chips to eliminate GPU idle time in AI data centers
item.description: Lightmatter has announced new silicon photonics products that could dramatically speed up AI systems by solving a critical problem: the sluggish connections between AI chips in data centers.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Low code and no code tools are safe from AI threat
item.description: As businesses look to build custom apps, AI will only make low-code and no-code solutions even more powerful.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Iceland Volcano Erupts Again, Residents Evacuated
item.description: Iceland volcano erupts again, residents evacuated, authorities warn of impending danger
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: This brain-computer interface allowed a stroke survivor to speak after 18 years
item.description: Scientists have developed a device that can translate thoughts about speech into spoken words in real time. Although it’s still experimental, they hope the brain-computer interface could someday help give voice to those unable to speak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk says he sent MAGA influencer Ashley St. Clair $2.5 million, open to paternity test
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk and conservative influencer Ashley St. Clair publicly feuded on the social platform X on Monday after she accused the world’s richest person of withdrawing child care support and refusing to take a paternity test.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Interest in foldable mobile phones is declining
item.description: Sales of foldable mobile phones are expected to fall by 4% this year compared to 2024, according to a new forecast by research firm Counterpoint. If the forecast comes true, it would be the biggest decline to date for the category.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump calls 'never ending' Signal leak story 'old and boring,' blasts media
item.description: President Trump slammed the media for its “never-ending” coverage of the Signal group chat leak, calling it “old and boring.” In a post Sunday on Truth Social, Trump praised Sen. Markwayne Mullin (R-Okla.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 6 advanced Gboard tricks for smarter Android typing
item.description: QWERTY, QWERTY, QWERTY. QWERTY. Oh — hi there! Sorry for the slightly nonsensical greeting. I’ve been thinking a lot about keyboards this week, y’see, and how that trusty ol’ QWERTY surface has evolved in our lives. Also, saying “QWERTY” over and over again is surprisingly fun to do.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Preserve loved ones' voicemails on iPhone
item.description: Saving the voices of loved ones can be a comforting way to keep alive memories. Kurt "the CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to preserve voicemail messages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft lauds Hyperlight Wasm for WebAssembly workloads
item.description: Microsoft has unveiled Hyperlight Wasm, a virtual machine “micro-guest” that can run WebAssembly component workloads written in a multitude of languages including C and Python. Introduced March 26, Hyperlight Wasm serves as a Rust library crate.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Critical RCE flaws put Kubernetes clusters at risk of takeover
item.description: The Kubernetes project has released patches for five vulnerabilities in a widely used popular component called the Ingress NGINX Controller that’s used to route external traffic to Kubernetes services. If exploited, the flaw could allow attackers to completely take over entire clusters.
item.dc:creator: csoonline
